tasks.label: Build & Deploy Pip-Boy ADV to SD
tasks.command: Write-Host 'Building Pip-Boy ADV firmware...' -ForegroundColor Cyan; pio run; if ($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0) { Write-Host 'Build successful! Deploying to SD card...' -ForegroundColor Green; $sdDrive = 'D:'; $appPath = "$sdDrive/apps/PipBoyADV"; $assetsPath = "$appPath/assets/Images"; Write-Host 'Creating directory structure...' -ForegroundColor Yellow; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $appPath -Force | Out-Null; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $assetsPath -Force | Out-Null; Write-Host 'Copying firmware binary...' -ForegroundColor Yellow; Copy-Item -Path '.pio/build/cardputer-adv/firmware.bin' -Destination "$appPath/main.bin" -Force; Write-Host 'Copying assets...' -ForegroundColor Yellow; if (Test-Path 'data/assets/Images') { Copy-Item -Path 'data/assets/Images/*' -Destination $assetsPath -Recurse -Force } else { Write-Host 'Warning: data/assets/Images not found, skipping asset copy' -ForegroundColor DarkYellow }; Write-Host 'Creating app.json...' -ForegroundColor Yellow; $appJson = @{ name = 'Pip-Boy ADV'; version = '1.0.0'; author = 'Evil0ctopus'; description = 'Pip-Boy OS for Cardputer ADV'; entry = 'main.bin'; category = 'tools' } | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 10; Set-Content -Path "$appPath/app.json" -Value $appJson -Force; Write-Host 'Copying config template...' -ForegroundColor Yellow; if (Test-Path 'data/config.txt.example') { Copy-Item -Path 'data/config.txt.example' -Destination "$sdDrive/config.txt" -Force } else { Write-Host 'Warning: data/config.txt.example not found' -ForegroundColor DarkYellow }; Write-Host 'Deployment complete!' -ForegroundColor Green; Write-Host ''; Write-Host 'SD Card Structure:' -ForegroundColor Cyan; Write-Host "  $sdDrive/apps/PipBoyADV/main.bin" -ForegroundColor White; Write-Host "  $sdDrive/apps/PipBoyADV/app.json" -ForegroundColor White; Write-Host "  $sdDrive/apps/PipBoyADV/assets/Images/" -ForegroundColor White; Write-Host "  $sdDrive/config.txt" -ForegroundColor White } else { Write-Host 'Build failed! Deployment aborted.' -ForegroundColor Red; exit 1 }
